name: keda
explanation: KedaCheck inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 and only requires an openmetrics_endpoint. KEDA's components (admissions controller, metrics API server, operator) each expose Prometheus metrics on a fixed `/metrics` path on port 8080, so the discovery layer just needs to scan that port on each KEDA pod. No credentials are needed and the path is canonical, matching the OpenMetrics-on-a-known-port pattern.
notes: No auto_conf.yaml ships with the integration today, but the contract (host + 8080 + /metrics) is uniform across all KEDA components and a port scan would discover each.
